title: Istio AuthorizationPolicy
description: An AuthorizationPolicy enables access control on workloads in the mesh. It supports ALLOW, DENY, AUDIT, and CUSTOM actions based on source, operation, and condition matching rules.

matchLabels.description: One or more labels that indicate a specific set of pods/VMs on which the policy should be applied.

selector.description: Workload selector to apply the policy to specific workloads.

targetRefs.description: Target references to apply the policy to specific resources.

action.description: The action to take when a rule is matched. Default is ALLOW.

name.description: The name of the extension provider. Used when action is CUSTOM.

provider.description: Specifies the external authorization provider when action is CUSTOM.

rules.description: A list of rules to match for the policy.

principals.description: A list of peer identities derived from the peer certificate.

notPrincipals.description: A list of negative match of peer identities.

requestPrincipals.description: A list of request identities derived from the JWT.

notRequestPrincipals.description: A list of negative match of request identities.

namespaces.description: A list of namespaces derived from the peer certificate.

notNamespaces.description: A list of negative match of namespaces.

ipBlocks.description: A list of IP blocks in CIDR format.

notIpBlocks.description: A list of negative match of IP blocks.

remoteIpBlocks.description: A list of remote IP blocks in CIDR format.

notRemoteIpBlocks.description: A list of negative match of remote IP blocks.

from.description: Specifies the source of a request.

hosts.description: A list of hosts as specified in the HTTP request.

notHosts.description: A list of negative match of hosts.

ports.description: A list of ports as specified in the connection.

notPorts.description: A list of negative match of ports.

methods.description: A list of methods as specified in the HTTP request.

notMethods.description: A list of negative match of methods.

paths.description: A list of paths as specified in the HTTP request.

notPaths.description: A list of negative match of paths.

to.description: Specifies the operation of a request.

key.description: The name of an Istio attribute.

values.description: A list of allowed values for the attribute.

notValues.description: A list of negative match of values for the attribute.
